meaning: n.肥皂水上的泡沫,有泡沫的肥皂水
examples: Her hands happily plunged into soapsuds, she gazes gratefully at her husband, Bob, under the headline: "she wouldn't take No for an answer".
The young woman had apparently been in the middle of a washing day, for she wore an apron, her sleeves were rolled up to the elbow, and there were soapsuds on her hands.
